name: andwell-innovation
description: Andwell Innovation command center for competitive intelligence, growth planning, staffing, launch execution, and board-ready strategy.

scripts.build: npm run clean:next && cross-env NEXT_DISABLE_WEBPACK_CACHE=1 next build
scripts.build:next: npm run clean:next && cross-env NEXT_DISABLE_WEBPACK_CACHE=1 next build
scripts.build:strict: npm run clean:next && cross-env CIH_STRICT_BUILD=1 NEXT_DISABLE_WEBPACK_CACHE=1 next build
